visual_findings: Reference-intent scoring improved the generated drawing: the right projected-view dimensions are present and top/front dimensions are closer to a manufacturing drawing than the prior AutoDimension-like baseline cluster.
The drawing is still not acceptable: the angled 2 X R2 / M4-6H / note-style callout stack overlaps the top view and obscures the hole-position area.
The generated dimension presentation remains heavier and less concise than the same-name reference drawing; a drafter would still need manual cleanup before manufacturing release.

The staged worker also failed after generation because legacy quality_check hit SolidWorks OpenDoc6 RPC failure, so this screenshot is visual evidence for a fresh generated PNG but not a deliverable PASS.
cases.required_next_action: Route hole/radius/thread callouts into a dedicated non-overlap leader lane outside the top-view box, then rerun 006 staged CAD and repeat application UI screenshot review.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing.
